description: Contains basic information about companies with SEC filings in the database.

columns.name: ticker
columns.description: Company stock ticker symbol (e.g., NVDA, AAPL, TSLA)

columns.name: fiscal_year_end
columns.description: Date of the company's fiscal year end

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the company record was created

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the company record was last updated

table_rules: Use ticker as the primary key for joining with other tables
When displaying company information, join with this table to get the full company name

column_rules.ticker: Primary key for the table, used for joining with other tables
column_rules.name: Use for display purposes to show the full company name
